title: STOP pretending AI doesn’t Affect You
summary: David Ondrej argues that AI has real impacts on society that people should acknowledge rather than deny. The video challenges the notion that AI effects are remote or irrelevant to individuals.
writeup: David Ondrej makes the case that AI already has tangible effects on society and that dismissing those effects as distant or irrelevant is a mistake. The video frames AI's reach through economics and broader societal impact, arguing these consequences touch individuals rather than staying abstract. The central takeaway: AI's influence should be acknowledged and reckoned with, not denied.
